title: No More Creepers Grief
description: All creepers explosion modification straight disable creepers explosion, this fabric mod allows you to set their explosion to be tnt-like, makes creepers still menacing but removes the frustration of permanently losing the blocks you placed.
body:
# No More Creepers Grief All creepers explosion modification straight disable creepers explosion, this fabric mod allows you to set their explosion to be tnt-like, makes creepers still menacing but removes the frustration of permanently losing the blocks you placed. This also allows creepers to be used for functional stuff with them acting like tnt.
The mod allows you also to disable the explosion griefing completely. ## Use Use with Cloth-config and though mod menu easily config how creepers explosions behave ## Requires fabric-api https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
cloth-config https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config ## Suggested Mod menu https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu ## License MIT
